    "The silicone sealant is removed using a razor blade, revealing the hardened epoxy underneath.",
    "The diffuser bar is bolted to a pre-threaded aluminum U-bar using M4 bolts, securing it in place.",
    "Masking tape is applied along the entire length of the diffuser to secure it to the aluminum U-bar."
